title: [RC-WS1.4] Perf-blocking regression gate for heavyweight runtimes

test_coverage.python3_perf: python3 -c 'print(1)' runs within 3x baseline under strict mode preload
test_coverage.perl_perf: perl -e 'print 1' runs within 3x baseline under strict mode preload
test_coverage.per_binary_budget: Each runtime has configurable ppm budget via environment variables
test_coverage.statistical_sampling: 10 samples with 2 warmup runs, p50/p95/p99.9 latencies reported

done_when_evidence: Gate tests python3 and perl (2 heavyweight runtimes)
Per-binary p99.9 budgets enforced (3x default, configurable)
Gate fails if any runtime exceeds its budget
Results JSON artifact generated with detailed latency breakdowns
known_limitations: Node.js crashes under preload (separate bug, tracked separately)
p99.9 approximated as max of 10 samples due to small sample size
